markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the Sunbit.ai proposal and discuss content production bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sunbit.ai Proposal:** GrowthX proposed a new content strategy targeting engineers to build investor credibility. Sunbit will use its existing blog infrastructure, requiring a revised quote from GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Content Production Bottleneck:** Publishing is delayed because the GrowthX webhook isn't syncing images to WordPress. Jason will fix the sync and explore templating content to bypass legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Performance:** Metrics are strong, with clicks up 84% and 8 new articles already generating traffic. Sunbit's AI visibility is solid against competitors, though still behind CareCredit.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [**Leadership Change:** Sunbit hired a new CMO from Meta/Apple to focus on consumer awareness. Jason will introduce her to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** Publishing is delayed, which negatively impacts performance.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The GrowthX webhook is not syncing article images to WordPress.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Solution:** Jason will configure the webhook to push images to WordPress.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [Legal review is no longer required for certain topics, accelerating the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [GrowthX offered to assist with publishing to clear the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [A duplicate article was sent; Angel will delete it.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Sunbit.ai Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build investor credibility by first earning the trust of a technical audience.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** Engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Content Model:** "Smart Explainers" → Break down complex topics with technical depth for engineers, while making the "what" and "why" accessible to non-technical readers.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Content Sourcing:** Repurpose Sunbit's internal expertise to reduce the team's writing burden.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [**Sources:** Academic research (including Hebrew-language papers), webinars, podcasts, and "brain dumps" from technical experts.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach is less intimidating for engineers than writing from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Sunbit.ai Site & Pricing

  - [**Site:** Sunbit is already building its AI blog on WordPress, making GrowthX's proposed site build unnecessary.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [**Design:** The proposal included a dark-mode, monospace-font theme to appeal to engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Pricing:** GrowthX will provide a revised quote for editorial content only.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [**Initial Quote:** $15k/month for editorial, plus a separate site build/launch fee.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Revised Quote:** A package price for editorial, integrated with the existing GrowthX agreement.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### B2C Content Templating

  - [**Proposal:** Template \~50% of B2C page content to bypass legal review bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Templated Elements:** Branded positioning, competitor comparisons (e.g., CareCredit), disclaimers, and shop directories.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Workflow:** GrowthX's pipeline can push content directly to WordPress fields. Sunbit's agency can build the required modules.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### Performance & AI Visibility

  - [**User Growth:** Averaging \~80 users/day in Jan, \~100/day in Feb.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [**Clicks:** Up 84% for search listing breakout pages, driven by the Dental category.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [**New Content:** 8 new articles in the "auto tips" subcategory are already generating clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:** Sunbit has strong visibility against competitors, though it trails CareCredit, which has a larger B2C ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

### Leadership Update

  - [**New Hire:** Sunbit has a new CMO, formerly of Meta (Ray-Ban launch) and Apple (marketing strategy).](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [**Focus:** The new CMO will focus on high-level consumer awareness, not day-to-day operations.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [**Action:** Jason will introduce the CMO to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [Fix the GrowthX → WordPress image sync.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Introduce the new CMO to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
      - [Provide a revised quote for Sunbit.ai editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
      - [Send the updated Sunbit.ai proposal with the revised quote.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [**Angel:**](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Delete the duplicate article from the WordPress backend.](https://fathom.video/share/kyQRPNNe6B5SeZbcmUm1PF3VuPFYpFXa?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
